_instructions: This file maps each visible form field to its corresponding hidden GHL form field. You need to fill in the 'ghl_field_name' values by inspecting the GHL form embed code. To find them: 1) Go to GHL > Sites > Forms > your form > Integrate > Copy Embed Code. 2) Paste the embed code in a text editor. 3) Look for <input> and <select> and <textarea> tags — the 'name' attribute on each is what you need.

fields.label: Tell us more about your event
fields.placeholder: Share the details: guest count, goals, and what matters most.

fields.label: I accept the company's terms and conditions and consent to being contacted
